agreement.full_name: Protocol on Trade Negotiations among Developing Countries (GATT Framework)

tariff_sheets.member_country: READ PER-ROW from column B (Country) - single flat table, not vertical blocks like GSTP

notes: CONFIRMED SIMPLER than GSTP: PTN is a single flat table with ONE header row (row 11) and a Country column (B) that changes value row-by-row — NOT the vertical repeating-block structure GSTP uses. Column C 'Tariff_Item_Number' confirmed to hold historical/pre-HS-style codes (e.g. '08.05', '2009192') — per Document B, description (column D) is the primary reference here too, same reasoning as GSTP. Only a single Preferential_Rate column exists (no LDC/non-LDC split, unlike SAPTA) — 'multi_country_ldc' family label is used per the Loader Spec's table grouping PTN with SAPTA/GSTP, but this file does NOT actually have separate LDC/non-LDC rate columns the way SAPTA does — FLAGGED: confirm whether PTN's single Preferential_Rate should default to rate_condition='standard' rather than 'ldc'/'non_ldc', since the source data doesn't distinguish.
